title: Bismillah
writer: Pavel Blyakhin, Igor Savchenko, Arkadi Yalovoy

plot: Religiously themed early Soviet propaganda film in Azerbaijan against Islam. Unlike earlier propaganda films in the region, this was actually made by an (nearly) all Azeri cast and crew and directed by an Azeri filmmaker that woul...
